name: Plan
description:
A method for doing or achieving something, usually involving a series of actions or stages, or something you have arranged to do. (Cambridge Dictionary)

A plan is a set of intended actions, through which one intends to achieve a goal.

"Course of action" is a synonym for Plan.

attributeList.name: PlanBudget
attributeList.description: An arrangement which is specifying an estimate of costs, revenues, and resources over a specified period, reflecting a reading of future financial conditions and goals. (adapted from Business Dictionary)

attributeList.name: PlannedAction
attributeList.description: An action that is arranged in a plan for doing or achieving something

attributeList.name: PlanType
attributeList.description: A Classification value that specifies the type of Plan
